market: AI demand is still real and broadening, but leadership is rotating from simple capex scale stories toward names that can prove utilization, pricing discipline, and free-cash-flow durability.
tech: What monetizes now: compute, packaging, networking, reasoning-heavy enterprise workflows, and constrained agents. What is still overstated: broad autonomous enterprise agents in regulated environments.
risk: Top risks are capex outrunning monetization, power/interconnection delays turning demand into deferred deployment, and export-control/regulatory shifts reshaping where frontier AI can be built and sold.
